name: MIHAN
metaTitle: Property in MIHAN Nagpur | NMRDA Approved Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots near MIHAN Nagpur. Mahalaxmi Infra offers residential plots starting ₹22 Lakh near AIIMS, IIM & Wardha Road.
heroSubheading: India's Largest SEZ — Nagpur's Fastest Appreciating Zone
introduction: MIHAN — the Multi-modal International Cargo Hub and Airport at Nagpur — is one of India's most ambitious infrastructure projects. Covering 4,354 hectares on Nagpur's Wardha Road, it hosts AIIMS Nagpur, IIM Nagpur, an international cargo airport, IT parks, and a sprawling Special Economic Zone. This has turned the MIHAN corridor into Nagpur's single most sought-after real estate destination in 2025. Localities adjacent to MIHAN — including Sumthana, Jamtha, and Beltarodi — have seen annual property appreciation of 20–40% over the last three years. Early investors have already recorded 2x returns on their land holdings. Mahalaxmi Infra's projects in this corridor — including Mahalaxmi Nagar 42 (Jamtha) and Mahalaxmi Nagar 45 (Sumthana) — are NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved, and eligible for up to 90% bank financing.
whyInvest: AIIMS Nagpur, IIM Nagpur, and International Airport all within the zone
2 lakh+ jobs expected by 2030 — built-in demand
Samruddhi Mahamarg access for pan-Maharashtra connectivity

faqs.question: Is MIHAN Nagpur good for property investment?
faqs.answer: Yes. MIHAN is Nagpur's fastest appreciating real estate zone driven by AIIMS, IIM, IT parks and an international cargo airport. Plots adjacent to MIHAN have appreciated 20–40% annually since 2021.

faqs.question: Which areas are closest to MIHAN?
faqs.answer: Sumthana, Jamtha, Beltarodi, and Besa are the closest residential localities to MIHAN on the Wardha Road corridor. Mahalaxmi Infra has active projects in Sumthana and Jamtha.

faqs.question: Are plots near MIHAN eligible for bank loans?
faqs.answer: Yes. NMRDA sanctioned and RERA approved plots near MIHAN qualify for up to 90% bank financing from SBI, Bank of Maharashtra, Axis Bank, and HDFC.

faqs.question: What is the starting price of plots near MIHAN Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Mahalaxmi Infra plots near the MIHAN corridor start from ₹22 Lakh. Contact us for current pricing and availability.
